title: School Outreach Visit
subtitle: To create awareness and interest among school students in optics, photonics, and related scientific concepts through an interactive educational visit.
description: BVP OPTICA conducted a school outreach visit aimed at introducing students to the fundamentals of optics and science through interactive discussions and engagement activities. The session focused on encouraging curiosity and learning in a friendly and participative environment. Students were introduced to basic optical concepts through simple demonstrations and real-life examples, making the learning process more engaging and relatable. The activities helped spark interest in science and motivated young minds to explore the field further.
highlights: Interactive sessions with engaging discussions and activities.
Inspired young minds to explore careers in science
